title: Liam Knight
extract:
Liam Knight (born 15 January 1995) is an Australian rugby league footballer who plays as a prop or loose forward for Cessnock Goannas in the Newcastle Rugby League.
He previously played for Hull FC in the Super League and the South Sydney Rabbitohs, Manly Warringah Sea Eagles and the Canberra Raiders in the National Rugby League (NRL).
